stemHtml: During the walk-around, you notice a piece of equipment is missing from the aircraft. An engineer is not available to fix the problem. Can the flight still be made?

options.a: Yes, if the dispatcher accounts for this change on the load sheet.
options.b: Yes, if the item is not required in the MEL.
options.c: Yes, if the commander decides that the item is not required for that flight.
options.d: No, as the aircraft must be fully functional to undertake a flight.
